name: Circuito RL
description: Calcule a constante de tempo de um circuito RL.
seo_description: Calcule a constante de tempo de um circuito RL. Calculadora gratuita, precisa e instantânea. Calculadora facil de usar com detalhamento da formula.
example_label: Calculate the time constant and final current for an RL circuit with L=0.5 H and R=25 Ω.
result_context: The time constant {tau} s determines how fast current reaches final value {current_final} A.
formula_display: Ïâ€ž = L ÷ R, I_final = V ÷ R (assuming V = 10V)
steps: Inductance L = 0.5 H, Resistance R = 25 Ω
